modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access peer note-taker notes in Accommodate.

full_description_text: User is trying to access notes from peer note-taker. They are unsure how to do this. The system is Accommodate by Symplicity. There may be a navigation issue or access problem.
